events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the IR thermal signature at a termination/splice point indicates a high-resistance connection from insufficient torque, a violation of NEC 110.14. Marked as `fail` with `high` risk and `installed-defective`/`non-compliant` conditions, since the connection must be de-energized, cleaned, re-torqued to spec, and re-scanned before closeout.
